name: Kimai
short_description: Open-source multi-user time tracking, billing, and reporting platform for freelancers and teams.
description: Kimai is a multi-user time-tracking system with invoicing features, expense tracking, role-based permissions, and reporting for freelancers and small teams. It supports project-based entries, export to CSV/PDF, and optional LDAP/OAuth authentication in self-hosted deployments.
usecases: Generate invoices and reports for clients.
notes: Set strong secrets and use external database volume backups.
